project: React Native SDK - Multi-user Video Conferencing
description: Enable real room connections, participant sync, and multi-user video conferencing in @q9labs/chalk-react-native

userStories.title: Fix race condition in PreCallScreen stream initialization
userStories.description: PreCallScreen calls startStream() before ChalkProvider finishes initializing rtcManager, causing 'RTCManager not available' error and black camera preview
verification: Use ios-simulator skill: python scripts/app_launcher.py --launch com.q9labs.chalk-example
Use ios-simulator skill: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Create' --tap
Check Metro logs for '[useLocalStream] Got stream: {"stream": true}'
Verify NO '[useLocalStream] RTCManager not available' error after tap
Use ios-simulator skill: xcrun simctl io booted screenshot to capture result

userStories.title: Fix iOS permission detection returning 'unavailable'
userStories.description: usePermissions hook always shows camera/microphone as 'unavailable' on iOS even when permissions are already granted, blocking camera preview from starting
verification: Use ios-simulator skill: python scripts/privacy_manager.py --bundle-id com.q9labs.chalk-example --grant camera,microphone
Use ios-simulator skill: python scripts/app_launcher.py --terminate com.q9labs.chalk-example then --launch
Use ios-simulator skill: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Create' --tap
Take screenshot and verify 'Camera: granted' and 'Microphone: granted' are shown (not 'unavailable')
Verify hasRequiredPermissions is true in the UI (Join Call button should be enabled, not dimmed)

userStories.title: Fix VideoView not rendering stream
userStories.description: VideoView receives valid stream with streamURL but renders black/empty. Metro logs show valid streamURL but no video appears in preview area
verification: Use ios-simulator skill: Launch app and navigate to PreCallScreen
Check Metro logs show '[VideoView] Rendering stream:' with valid streamURL
Take screenshot - preview area should show camera feed OR clear 'camera unavailable' message
NOT a black box with no explanation
If on simulator without camera, verify placeholder UI explains the limitation

userStories.title: Fix CallScreen status stuck on 'Connecting'
userStories.description: CallScreen shows 'Connecting' status indefinitely in demo mode instead of showing 'Demo Mode' or appropriate status
verification: Use ios-simulator skill: Navigate to PreCallScreen then tap 'Join Call'
Use ios-simulator skill: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Join' --tap
Take screenshot of CallScreen
Verify status badge shows 'Demo Mode' NOT 'Connecting'
Use ios-simulator skill: Test controls - tap mute, camera, hand raise buttons and verify they respond

userStories.title: Add error UI when camera unavailable
userStories.description: When running on simulator without camera support, user sees confusing black screen instead of helpful error message explaining why camera isn't working
verification: Use ios-simulator skill: Launch app on simulator
Navigate to PreCallScreen
If camera stream fails or returns empty, UI should show clear message like 'Camera not available on simulator'
Take screenshot to verify - should NOT be a black preview with no text
Error should be user-friendly, not a technical error message

userStories.title: Add tokenProvider support to React Native ChalkProvider
userStories.description: React Native ChalkProvider only supports static token/apiKey but web version has tokenProvider for dynamic JWT refresh. Add tokenProvider prop to match web SDK capabilities.
verification: ChalkProviderProps interface includes tokenProvider?: () => Promise<string>
ChalkProvider accepts and uses tokenProvider when provided
Token refresh works - when token expires, tokenProvider is called again
bun run check-types passes
Existing apiKey/token auth continues to work (backwards compatible)

userStories.title: Configure example app with working authentication
userStories.description: Example app has no authentication configured - just apiUrl. Need to add tokenProvider that fetches JWT from API or use environment variable for API key so rooms actually connect.
verification: Example App.tsx has tokenProvider or apiKey configured
Launch app, create room, join - status shows 'Live' or 'Connected' NOT 'Demo Mode'
Metro logs show successful API responses (not 401/403 errors)
Room connection is established (WebSocket connected)
userStories.note: Auth code complete (f986b55). WebRTC connection blocked by infra: enable_calls=false in Terraform. Requires Cloudflare Calls account activation.

userStories.title: Fix participant sync between web and mobile
userStories.description: When joining same room from web and mobile, participants don't see each other. After auth works, need to verify participant-joined/left events fire and useParticipants reflects remote users.
verification: Join room on web app with one user
Join same room on mobile app with different user
Web app shows mobile participant in participant list
Mobile app shows web participant in participant list
useParticipants hook returns correct participant count on both platforms
participant-joined event fires when remote user joins

userStories.title: Render remote participant video tracks
userStories.description: CallScreen only shows local video preview. Need to display grid/list of remote participant video streams using VideoView component.
verification: CallScreen shows remote participant video tiles (not just local preview)
Remote video streams render in VideoView components
Video grid adjusts layout based on participant count
Remote participant name labels show correctly
When remote participant leaves, their video tile is removed

userStories.title: Add remote participant audio playback
userStories.description: Remote participant audio needs to play through device speakers. Ensure audio tracks from remote participants are attached and playing.
verification: Join room with two devices (web + mobile)
Speak on web - audio should play on mobile device speakers
Speak on mobile - audio should play on web
Muting local audio stops remote from hearing
Audio continues working when video is disabled
